data.description:
## What (SDET review MINORs)
- test_store_concurrency.py:27 resolves on-PATH rebar at import and SKIPS SILENTLY if it lacks rebar._store (false green under a stale install); also inherits ambient REBAR_*. Prefer xfail over skip; scrub REBAR_*.
- test_id_collision.py:25 _N=2000 over a 16-hex space ~never collides — near-tautology; raise N or reframe as a format/determinism check.
- CLI --output schema coverage (test_schema_coverage.py:48-61) is help-text-substring-driven + only checks registry membership — no mechanical "every CLI --output advertiser validates REAL output" guard equivalent to the MCP one. Add it.
- test_leaf_writes_parity.py: name is historical; confirm the lone bash test (L32) does not silently fall back to python (which would make its count==2 assert vacuous); else relabel.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] store-concurrency uses xfail (not silent skip) + scrubs REBAR_* env
- [ ] id-collision gate strengthened (higher N or reframed as format/determinism)
- [ ] a mechanical CLI --output-validates-real-output guard added (MCP-parity)
- [ ] leaf-writes lone-bash test verified non-vacuous or relabeled
data.title: SDET minor test-quality cluster (skip->xfail, collision gate, CLI --output guard, leaf-writes naming)
